name: pig-command-compiler
description: Pig extension for compiling fuzzy user input into typed, validated, deterministic commands

scripts.test: npm run build && PIG_COMMAND_COMPILER_EMBEDDINGS=0 node tests/compiler-smoke.mjs && PIG_COMMAND_COMPILER_EMBEDDINGS=0 node tests/diagnostics-smoke.mjs
scripts.test:diagnostics: npm run build && PIG_COMMAND_COMPILER_EMBEDDINGS=0 node tests/diagnostics-smoke.mjs
